step_rationale: Core lipidome of atherogenic lipoproteins and foam cells; plaque lipid composition; MI risk marker.
mechanism: Cholesteryl esters accumulate in foam cells and atherogenic lipoproteins, driving plaque formation and remodeling post-MI.
